name_cn:
Dior Groove🔆 16 Mini Handbag "Blue"
This Dior Groove 16 mini handbag is a new addition to the 2024 Winter Ready-to-Wear collection, designed by Maria Grazia Chiuri, elegant and stylish. Crafted from blue calfskin, it features a quilted oversized houndstooth pattern to elevate the style. The compartment is spacious enough for various daily essentials. With a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal handbag for daily styling.
Zip closure
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap
Model: 1365
Dimensions: 16 x 10 x 8 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 card holder, keys and lipstick
